fatiguePatterns: Indoor clusters have become dominant enough to flatten the world.

guidanceNotes: Keep recurring object families as memory texture, not default crutches: comfort_item, stationery
Use familiar places selectively so they feel lived-in instead of repetitive: bookstore_aisle, covered_walkway
